name: @shrey-junior/sj-ui
description: Local-first desktop control surface for the Kiwi Control repo control plane

scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');fs.rmSync('dist-types',{recursive:true,force:true});fs.rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true});fs.rmSync('tsconfig.test.tsbuildinfo',{force:true});" && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && vite build && node ../../scripts/remove-macos-metadata.mjs dist-types dist
scripts.test: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');fs.rmSync('dist-types',{recursive:true,force:true});fs.rmSync('tsconfig.test.tsbuildinfo',{force:true});" && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node ../../scripts/remove-macos-metadata.mjs dist-types && node --test dist-types/ui/*.test.js
